riskFlags.title: Termination mechanics are one-sided and unresolved

riskFlags.title: No indemnity allocation for third-party claims

riskFlags.recommendation: Consider adding clear indemnities for appropriate third-party claims, including procedures, exclusions, and any liability cap interaction.

riskFlags.title: Liability cap may be under-protective for data and implementation risks

riskFlags.recommendation: Review whether separate or higher caps should apply to data, security, IP, confidentiality, and other high-impact risks.

reference.rationale: The contract includes only the first stages of dispute resolution.
